title: crataegus × aberrans
intro: Crataegus × aberrans, also known as the hybrid hawthorn, is a cross between the English hawthorn (Crataegus monogyna) and the Midland hawthorn (Crataegus laevigata). This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, particularly for its medicinal properties related to heart health, including lowering blood pressure, improving circulation, and acting as an antioxidant. The health benefits of Crataegus × aberrans include reducing inflammation, fighting against oxidative stress, and potentially alleviating symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, capsules, and extracts, which are often used to promote cardiovascular well-being and support overall health.
